info.description: Sub-page under Shop > Personalised Pieces. All visible copy is editable here.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

kicker_colour.description: Hex colour for the kicker label.

paragraph_1.default: The word you keep coming back to, worn close to your throat. Names, dates, and words that matter, hand-engraved on pieces designed to last.

paragraph_2.default: Personalised jewellery has been at the heart of Anna Lou of London since the beginning. From the Portobello Road stall to Harrods, the principle has never changed: a piece of jewellery should mean something.

paragraph_3.default: Every personalised piece is made to order in the Design Lab on Taggs Island. Allow 5 to 7 working days for production. UK delivery is free on orders over £50.

paragraph_4.default: For bespoke commissions or custom designs, please get in touch directly.

inspiration_label.default: Looking for inspiration? Read how to choose your word
inspiration_label.description: Secondary link shown below the main CTA on /shop/personalised. Points buyers to an article or guide if they need help deciding what to engrave. Leave blank to hide.

inspiration_url.description: Target URL for the inspiration link. Usually points to a guide article in the magazine.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Use the 'Generate SEO' button if available, then edit.
